name: on any_fct_called
title: on any_fct_called
description: This handler is called whenever a provided method of a distributed object derived from the given interface is called. At this time, the automatic answering feature has already set the out parameters and return value to their default values if it is configured.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units

row: object Parent object of the called method.
context Call context of the method call.
